---
title: "Iris Plots"
author: "Colleen Kellogg"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{R packages}
library(tidyverse)
library(microViz)
library(phyloseq)
library(speedyseq)
library(rcartocolor)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ggpubr)

```

```{R load data}

smicpf<-readRDS("C:/Users/Carolyn/Documents/seastar-microbiome-paper/code/decontam_filter_nonegs_prev.rds")

```

```{R Pisaster Class Iris Plots}

#### get top classes across sea stars #### 

#working with the prevalence filtered data, since that is what Carolyn used for beta diversity

#for each host so i can create a color palette that works for both iris plots

pis_top <- tax_top((smicpf %>%
  transform_sample_counts(function(x) x / sum(x)) %>%
  subset_samples(Host == "Pisaster ochraceus" & WastingScore == 0) %>%
  speedyseq::tax_glom(taxrank = "Class")), 
  n = 10, rank="Class")


derm_top <- tax_top((smicpf %>%
  transform_sample_counts(function(x) x / sum(x)) %>%
  subset_samples(Host == "Dermasterias imbricata" & WastingScore == 0) %>%
  speedyseq::tax_glom(taxrank = "Class")), 
  n = 10, rank="Class")

#### top class color palette ####

# combine top taxa and remove dupicates. or probably could just have set each to n = 12 and there would have been full overlap. :)

top_classes<-c(str_unique(c(pis_top,derm_top)),"Other") #top classes
palette<-c(rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11,"Spectral"))(12)),"lightgrey") #13 color palette
top_class_pal <- structure(palette, .Names = top_classes) #combine the two so that this can be use to specify color by taxa


#### pisaster ordination and iris ####

#healthy only 
pis_ord <- smicpf %>%
  transform_sample_counts(function(x) x / sum(x)) %>%
  subset_samples(Host == "Pisaster ochraceus" & WastingScore == 0) %>% 
  dist_calc("bray") %>%
  ord_calc(method = "NMDS")

pis_ord


pis_iris<-ord_plot_iris(
  data = pis_ord,
  tax_level = "Class",
  n_taxa = 12,
  anno_colour = "SiteType",
  tax_order = top_classes,
  palette = top_class_pal
) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("orange","mediumturquoise"))

pis_iris

ggsave(filename = "PISASTER-iris-plot-class-spectral.pdf", pis_iris, dpi = 300, width = 8, height = 6)

```

```{R Dermasterias Class Iris Plots}
#### dermasterias ordination and iris ####

#healthy only
derm_ord <- smicpf  %>%
  transform_sample_counts(function(x) x / sum(x)) %>%
  subset_samples(Host == "Dermasterias imbricata" & WastingScore == 0) %>% #healthy only
  dist_calc("bray") %>%
  ord_calc(method = "NMDS")

derm_iris<-ord_plot_iris(
  data = derm_ord,
  tax_level = "Class",
  n_taxa = 12,
  tax_order = top_classes,
  anno_colour = "SiteType",
  palette = top_class_pal
) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("orange","mediumturquoise"))

derm_iris

# ggsave(filename = "DERMASTERIAS-iris-plot-class_spectral.pdf",derm_iris, dpi = 300, width = 8, height = 6)

#### make iris panel ####
iris_grid<-ggarrange(pis_iris, derm_iris, ncol = 1, common.legend = TRUE, legend = "right", labels = c("a. P. ochraceus","b. D. imbricata"), font.label = list(face ="plain",size = 10), hjust = -0.25)

iris_grid

ggsave("iris_grid_nmds.jpeg", iris_grid, height = 8, width = 6)
```

```{R Healthy Stars and Seawater Class Iris Plot}
#### all healthy stars and seawater ####

top_all<-tax_top((smicpf %>%
  transform_sample_counts(function(x) x / sum(x)) %>%
  subset_samples(WastingScore == 0 | Host == "Seawater") %>%
  speedyseq::tax_glom(taxrank = "Class")), 
  n = 13, rank="Class")

top_all #scooping in "Nitrososphaeria" 
top_allclass<-c(top_classes[1:12], "Nitrososphaeria","Other")
palette14<-c(rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11,"Spectral"))(12)),"#7A0132", "lightgrey") #14 color palette
top_allclass_pal <- structure(palette14, .Names = top_allclass) #combine the two so that this can be use to specify color by taxa

#healthy only 
all_ord <- smicpf %>%
  transform_sample_counts(function(x) x / sum(x)) %>%
  subset_samples(WastingScore == 0 | Host == "Seawater") %>% 
  dist_calc("bray") %>%
  ord_calc(method = "NMDS")

all_iris<-ord_plot_iris(
  data = all_ord,
  tax_level = "Class",
  n_taxa = 13,
  anno_colour = "Host",
  tax_order = top_allclass,
  palette = top_allclass_pal
) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#AD002AFF","#925E9FFF", "#0099B4FF"))

ggsave("all_host_iris_nmds.pdf", all_iris, height = 5, width = 6)


```
